questions: I feel grounded and resourceful — when things get hard I stay calm, think clearly, and trust that I'll find a workable path forward. Your landlord has just told you they're not renewing your lease and you have thirty days to find somewhere else. What do you do?

I feel grounded and resourceful — when things get hard I stay calm, think clearly, and trust that I'll find a workable path forward. You've applied to eight jobs over the past two months and haven't received a single interview. Someone asks how the search is going.

I feel grounded and resourceful — when things get hard I stay calm, think clearly, and trust that I'll find a workable path forward. You're trying to reach your doctor to discuss an urgent test result but the office keeps putting you on hold. What do you do?

I feel grounded and resourceful — when things get hard I stay calm, think clearly, and trust that I'll find a workable path forward. You've been trying for weeks to get a refund on a large purchase and the company keeps rejecting your requests. What's your next step?
